sections.paragraph:
Original: אניּה אורנה ארונה o

Transliteration: 'ăravnâh 'ôrnâh 'anı̂yâh

Phonetic: ar-av-naw'

BDB Definition:

= "joyful shouting of Jah (2Sa 24:18)"

= "make ye to shine (2Sa 24:16)"

= "joyful shouting of Jah (2Sa 24:18)"

  1. a Jebusite who sold David the site for an altar

Origin: all by orthographical variation for H771

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
